zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Grey於大約1150年出生在英國英格蘭艾可時，他的父親Anschetil de Grey21歲，母親Eva Redvers19歲。他於1163年與Hawise de Clare在英國英格蘭艾可瑟洛可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1214年10月18日在英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯坦德拉可享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Grey于大约1150年出生在英国英格兰艾可时，他的父亲Anschetil de Grey21岁，母亲Eva Redvers19岁。他于1163年与Hawise de Clare在英国英格兰艾可瑟洛可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1214年10月18日在英国英格兰奧可福爾斯坦德拉可享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Grey was born about 1150, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Anschetil de Grey, was 21 and his mother, Eva Redvers, was 19. He married Hawise de Clare in 1163, in Thurrock, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 18 October 1214, in Standlake, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Grey est né environ 1150, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Anschetil de Grey, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Eva Redvers, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Hawise de Clare en 1163, à Thurrock, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 18 octobre 1214, à Standlake, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Grey um 1150 in Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Anschetil de Grey 21 und seine Mutter Eva Redvers 19. Er hat 1163 in Thurrock, Essex, England, United Kingdom Hawise de Clare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Oktober 1214 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Standlake, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Grey è nato il circa 1150 nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Anschetil de Grey, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Eva Redvers, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Hawise de Clare nel 1163, nel Thurrock, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 ottobre 1214, nel Standlake, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Norwich, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Greyが約1150年にイギリスイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Anschetil de Greyは21歳，母Eva Redversは19歳であった。1163年にイギリスイギリスエセックススウロックでHawise de Clareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1214年10月18日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスタンドラクで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Grey(이)가 대략 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anschetil de Grey(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva Redvers(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1163년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스록에서 Hawise de Clare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1214년 10월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스탠들레이크에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Hawise de Clare em 1163, em Thurrock, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Grey родился около 1150 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Anschetil de Grey было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Eva Redvers, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise de Clare в 1163 г. в местности туррокк, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 18 октября 1214 г. в местности стандлеик, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Hawise de Clare en 1163, en Thurrock, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1214, en Standlake, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
